---
title: "genetic_load in maize"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-12-04"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//..//'))  
```

#remember more negative values menas meore deleterious load
#we have used Plant CAD DNA language model (zero shot score) to calulate deleteriousness

# plotting genetic load and number of deleterious in maize between wild, landrace and improved across different threholds with missing rate filters
thresholds: 5%, 10%, 25%
missing filters: 30%, 50%
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

outdir     <- "data/3.3_genetic_load_maize/"  
miss_level <- 50
groups     <- c("wild", "landrace", "improved")
cut_levels <- c(0.25, 0.10, 0.05)
cut_labels <- c("25%", "10%", "5%")

read_group <- function(outdir, group) {
  pats  <- file.path(outdir, sprintf("raw_%s_chr*.csv", group))
  files <- unique(unlist(lapply(pats, Sys.glob)))
  if (length(files) == 0)
    stop(sprintf("No files found for group=%s in %s", group, outdir))
  rbindlist(lapply(files, fread), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
}

df_wild <- read_group(outdir, "wild")
df_land <- read_group(outdir, "landrace")
df_imp  <- read_group(outdir, "improved")

df <- rbindlist(list(df_wild, df_land, df_imp), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# cutoffs 0.25, 0.10, 0.05
df[, cutoff := as.numeric(as.character(cutoff))]
df <- df[!is.na(cutoff) & cutoff %in% cut_levels]
df[, cutoff := factor(cutoff, levels = cut_levels, labels = cut_labels)]
df[, sub    := factor(sub, levels = groups)]
message("Rows per cutoff & group (maize 5/10/25%):")
print(df[, .N, by = .(cutoff, sub)][order(cutoff, sub)])

df_box <- copy(df)
fsize  <- 16

# Number of deleterious alleles
pN_mz <- ggplot(df_box, aes(x = sub, y = N_del, fill = cutoff)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x     = "",
    y     = "Number of deleterious alleles",
    title = sprintf("Maize – Missing \u2264 %d%%", miss_level)
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = fsize) +
  theme(
    axis.text    = element_text(size = fsize),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = fsize, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = fsize, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = fsize)
  )

# Genetic load
pW_mz <- ggplot(df_box, aes(x = sub, y = Genetic_load, fill = cutoff)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x     = "",
    y     = "Genetic load",
    title = sprintf("Maize – Missing \u2264 %d%%", miss_level)
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = fsize) +
  theme(
    axis.text    = element_text(size = fsize),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = fsize, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = fsize, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = fsize)
  )

ggsave(sprintf("graphs/01_publication/3.genetic_load/Ndel_maize_miss%02d.png", miss_level), plot   = pN_mz, width  = 10, height = 7, dpi    = 200)
ggsave(sprintf("graphs/01_publication/3.genetic_load/GenLoad_maize_miss%02d.png", miss_level), plot   = pW_mz, width  = 10, height = 7, dpi    = 200)

```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

cols <- c(
  wild     = "#1B9E77",
  landrace = "#D95F02",
  improved = "#7570B3"
)

outdir     <- "data/3.3_genetic_load_maize/"
miss_level <- 50
groups     <- c("wild", "landrace", "improved")

read_group <- function(outdir, group) {
  pats  <- file.path(outdir, sprintf("raw_%s_chr*.csv", group))
  files <- unique(unlist(lapply(pats, Sys.glob)))
  if (length(files) == 0)
    stop(sprintf("No files found for group=%s in %s", group, outdir))
  rbindlist(lapply(files, fread), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
}

df_wild <- read_group(outdir, "wild")
df_land <- read_group(outdir, "landrace")
df_imp  <- read_group(outdir, "improved")

df <- rbindlist(list(df_wild, df_land, df_imp), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# Ensure correct ordering
df[, sub := factor(sub, levels = groups)]

# cutoff = 0.01 top 1%
df[, cutoff := as.numeric(as.character(cutoff))]
df001 <- df[cutoff == 0.01]

message("Rows per group at top 1% cutoff (0.01, maize):")
print(df001[, .N, by = sub])

# ABS genetic load
df001[, Genetic_load_abs := abs(Genetic_load)]

# Pairwise comparisons (same as sorghum)
comparisons <- list(
  c("wild", "landrace"),
  c("wild", "improved"),
  c("landrace", "improved")
)

p_top1_mz <- ggplot(df001, aes(x = sub, y = Genetic_load_abs, fill = sub)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width        = 0.7,
    outlier.size = 0.7,
    color        = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    hide.ns = TRUE,
    tip.length = 0.01,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Maize top 1%",
    x     = "",
    y     = "Abs genetic load"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(
  sprintf("graphs/01_publication/3.genetic_load/Abs_GenLoad_maize_cut001_miss%02d.pdf", miss_level),
  plot = p_top1_mz, width = 10, height = 7, useDingbats = FALSE
)


```
